name: stata-toolbox
description: The official working package of MCP-for-Stata plugin, including mcp config and stata-skill.

interface.shortDescription: Run Stata statistical analysis from Codex-compatible MCP clients.
interface.longDescription: Connects Codex to Stata for regression analysis, data processing, ado package management, and log reading. Supports CSV, DTA, XLSX, and SPSS data formats.
interface.defaultPrompt: Run a regression analysis using Stata
